title: Property Consultant - Liases Foras - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Liases Foras - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Liases Foras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Liases Foras:
Liases Foras is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liases Foras!
